text:

    audio/libgpod: Port to libplist_dict_set_item()

    Deprecated method plist_dict_insert_item() has been removed and
    replaced by plist_dict_set_item() in devel/libplist >= 2.3.0.

    PR:             280014
    Reported by:    <fabio.comolli@gmail.com>
